drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T1(f0 >= 3.0, $b0_0_0 : f0, $b0_0_1 : f2, f2 == false)
then
    $p0_0.setF2(true);
    $p0_0.setF0($p0_0.getF0());
    update($p0_0);
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f0 != -3.0, $b1_0_0 : f2)
then
    insert(new T1(3.0, $p1_0.getF1(), true));
end
rule "R2"
when
    T1($b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T1(f1 >= 2.0, $b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f1, f2 == false)
    T1(f0 <= $b3_0_0, $b3_1_0 : f0)
then
    $p3_0.setF2(true);
    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
no-loop
when
    T1()
    T1()
then
end
